titleStmt.title: SII 20.196: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 196. (B.K. No. 79 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: The inscription is dated in the king's regnal year 16, Tāraṇa, Jyēshṭha, śu. 5 Sunday. The date is irregular. The tithi corresponded to A.D. 1224, May 24, which was Friday and not Sunday.

The inscription records a gift of certain taxes and provisions for the offerings to God Svayaṁbhu Sōmanātha and the feeding of the ascetics by Kaḍuva [Ma]hanta, the tax-officer (Suṁkada Hegaḍe) of Lakshmīpāḷadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pra
tāpacakravaṟti śrīmatu siṁgaṇadēvavarisa 16 ṟe
neya tāraṇa saṁvaccharada jēṣṭa suda 5 Ādi
vāra byatīpātadaṁdu śrīmatu lakṣmīpāḷadēvara
sara suṁkada hegaḍe kaḍuva maha(ṁ)nta kaluke
ṟeya śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara nivēdya tapō
dhanara bhikṣege biṭṭa Ettu Okkuludeṟe hejuṁka bilu
koḍe mūlesuṁka sahita biṭṭa Ettu 20 naṁdādīvi
gege biṭṭa gāṇa Okkaludeṟe māneṇne koḷagaviṁḍi
biṭṭaru yī dharmmavanu Ā staḷada samasta praje muṁ
muridaṁḍaṁgaḷu gauḍu stāna mānya pratipāḷisuvaru .
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
